name: Acrylic Accessory Organizer with Drawer - Brightroom™: Jewelry Storage, Clear Acrylic Drawers, 7-Piece Set
description:
This Acrylic Accessory Organizer with Drawer from Brightroom™ is a chic solution for your jewelry assortment. Crafted from plastic, the organizer's transparent, blue-tinted construction allows better visibility and easy access to your accessories while maintaining a stylish look. The rectangular organizer features a four-tiered silhouette with cut-out pull drawers, providing generous depth for convenient storage.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
